evals.prompt: Run /crisp-dev:generate-deployment --saas. The last deploy tag is deploy/2026-04-29. Since that tag, the following files changed: CKB.Database/ckbcustom/Stored Procedures/cx_facings_analysis_report.sql, CKB.Database/ckbcustom/Tables/cx_conv_prod_key_mappings.sql, BHN.Pog.Converter/CXBHNPogConverter/SQL/Tables/ckbcustom.PopulateProductkeyMappingTable.sql. No .cs files changed.
evals.expected_output: Announces using generate-deployment skill. Runs git tag command to find deploy/2026-04-29. Runs git diff to get changed files. Categorizes: cx_conv_prod_key_mappings.sql as tier 1 (Table), PopulateProductkeyMappingTable.sql as tier 2 (Data), cx_facings_analysis_report.sql as tier 5 (Stored Procedure). Generates Deployments/YYYY-MM-DD/deploy_YYYY-MM-DD.sql with sections in order: TABLES, DATA, STORED PROCEDURES (no FUNCTIONS or VIEWS sections). Generates README with --saas Step 1 text ('Send to deployment team'). No DLL section in README. Commits the Deployments folder. Creates git tag deploy/YYYY-MM-DD. Does NOT run sqlcmd.

evals.prompt: Run /crisp-dev:generate-deployment --direct. The last deploy tag is deploy/2026-04-29. Since that tag: CKB.Database/ckbcustom/Stored Procedures/cx_automator_process.sql changed. BHN.Pog.Converter/CXBHNPogConverter/PogConverter.cs changed.
evals.expected_output: Announces using generate-deployment skill. Categorizes cx_automator_process.sql as tier 5 (Stored Procedure). Detects PogConverter.cs as a C# change in BHN.Pog.Converter project. Generates deploy SQL with only STORED PROCEDURES section. Generates README with --direct Step 1 text ('Run in SSMS'). Includes DLL section for BHN.Pog.Converter with Visual Studio build steps. After committing and tagging, presents confirmation dialog showing server (cx-lpt943\v2022), database (CKB), and file path. Waits for explicit 'yes' before running sqlcmd.

evals.prompt: Run /crisp-dev:generate-deployment --saas. There are no git tags matching deploy/*.
evals.expected_output: Announces using generate-deployment skill. Runs git tag command, finds no deploy/* tags. Stops and asks: 'No deploy tag found. Should I diff from the initial commit, or would you like to set a baseline tag manually first?' Does not generate any files until the user answers.

evals.prompt: Run /crisp-dev:generate-deployment --saas. Last tag is deploy/2026-04-29. Changed files include: some-random-file/custom.sql (does not match any known path pattern).
evals.expected_output: Classifies some-random-file/custom.sql as tier 99 (Unknown). Includes it at the end of the SQL script preceded by '-- WARNING: unrecognized path — verify ordering manually'. Adds a Notes section to the README listing the unrecognized file and instructing manual ordering verification.
